title: JavaScript Array Methods
description: Test your knowledge of common JavaScript array manipulation methods.

questions.questionText: Which method sorts the elements of an array in place and returns the sorted array?
The `map()` method creates a new array populated with the results of calling a provided function on every element in the calling array. What does it return?

options.text: A new array with transformed elements.
The first element that satisfies the provided testing function.
An object containing the new array and its length.

title: TypeScript Basic Types
description: A quick quiz on fundamental TypeScript data types.

questions.questionText: Which type annotation is used to declare a variable that can hold either a string or a number?
What does the `void` type typically represent in TypeScript function return types?

options.text: The function can return any type.
The function is guaranteed to return a value.
The function does not return a meaningful value.
The function returns only null or undefined.

title: React Hooks Fundamentals
description: Basic questions about React Hooks like useState and useEffect.

questions.questionText: Which hook allows you to add state to functional components?
The dependency array in `useEffect` controls when the effect runs. If the array is empty (`[]`), when does the effect execute?

options.text: Only on the initial render (component mount).
It will cause an infinite loop.

title: CSS Layout Basics
description: Fundamental concepts of CSS for page layout.

questions.questionText: Which CSS display value allows an element to behave like a block element at the top-level but inline within its parent?
In Flexbox, what does the `justify-content` property control?

options.text: Alignment of items on the cross axis.
Alignment of items on the main axis.
How flex items wrap onto multiple lines.
